name: Cherry Streusel Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and sugar in a large bowl. Cut in the butter until the mixture is crumbly. Set aside 1/2 cup of this mixture.
2. Add the baking powder and baking soda to the remaining flour mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the evaporated milk and lemon juice. Stir well and let set for 5 minutes until thickened.
4. Add the egg and almond extract to the milk mixture; stir until combined.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
6. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a greased 9-inch springform pan to form a shell.
7. Spread the cherry pie filling over the bottom and about 1 inch up the sides of the crust.
8. Drop small spoonfuls of the remaining batter over the pie filling.
9. Stir the almonds into the reserved crumb mixture and sprinkle evenly over the cake.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 50 to 55 minutes. Makes 1 coffee cake.
